summary: Iteration 101 - Learning Loop Engine testing complete. Backend: 30/30 tests passed. All learning loop endpoints functional: GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/summary (returns total_learning_events, corrections_by_type, top_corrected_document_types, top_corrected_vendors, vendor_aliases_created, customer_aliases_created, extraction_hints_recorded, automation_success_rate, correction_rate_by_document_type), GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/events (filterable by event_type, document_type, vendor_id, entity_type with total and events array sorted by most recent), GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/events/{doc_id} (returns plain array of events for specific document). Learning event auto-generation verified: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{doc_id} with corrected_type creates classification_correction event, corrected_fields creates field_correction events. Document enrichment working: learning_events_count, corrections_applied, learning_flags (frequent_correction, entity_override_used, classification_corrected). Frontend: Learning Signals section in DocumentIntelligencePanel shows events count badge, learning_flags badges, expandable event list with before/after values. Regression: All iteration_100 decision policy endpoints and iteration_98-99 bundle/lifecycle endpoints still work.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/summary returns all required fields (total_learning_events, corrections_by_type, top_corrected_document_types, top_corrected_vendors, vendor_aliases_created, customer_aliases_created, extraction_hints_recorded, automation_success_rate, correction_rate_by_document_type)
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/summary automation_success_rate is valid number between 0 and 1 (~94%)

Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{doc_id} with corrected_type creates classification_correction learning event
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{doc_id} with corrected_fields creates field_correction learning events

Backend: automation_success_rate calculated from global metrics (~94%)
Backend: correction_rate_by_document_type calculated per document type

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: learning_loop_service.py well-structured with proper hook pattern for capturing corrections
Backend: Learning events capture before/after values, confidence scores, correction source
Backend: Extraction hints auto-recorded on field corrections with correction_count and confidence_score
Backend: Vendor/customer aliases auto-created on entity overrides with proper entity_kind checks
Backend: update_automation_metrics() recalculates metrics from database on each summary call
Backend: Document enrichment (_update_document_learning_enrichment) correctly updates learning_events_count, corrections_applied, learning_flags
Backend: Hooks integrated in document_intelligence_service.py (lines 544-560) for classification and field corrections
Backend router: Learning endpoints correctly placed BEFORE catch-all /{doc_id} route
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js correctly conditionally renders Learning Signals section when learning_events_count > 0 || learningEvents.length > 0
Frontend: Learning events displayed with color-coded dots by event_type (purple for classification, amber for field, blue for entity)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Learning Signals section verified with correct data display)

seed_data_created.learning_events: 5 total events (2 classification_correction, 3 field_correction) on TEST-BUNDLE-B

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 101 - Learning Loop Engine fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/summary (metrics), GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/events (filterable list), GET /api/document-intelligence/learning/events/{doc_id} (plain array). Event types: classification_correction, field_correction, entity_override, transaction_match_override, bundle_membership_correction, manual_link_override. Learning hooks integrated in: document_intelligence_service.py (classification + field), entity_resolution_service.py (entity override), transaction_matching_service.py (match override), document_bundle_service.py (bundle membership). Document enrichment fields: learning_events_count, corrections_applied, learning_flags. Learning flags: frequent_correction (>=3 events), entity_override_used, classification_corrected. Key data-testids: learning-signals-section, learning-events-list. Activity events: learning_event_generated, extraction_hint_recorded. Collections: learning_events, vendor_aliases, customer_aliases, extraction_hints, learning_metrics. Test data: TEST-BUNDLE-B has 5 learning events with flags frequent_correction + classification_corrected. Automation success rate ~94%.

document_learning_events.returns: plain array of learning events for document

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API operates in DEMO_MODE. Email Service is MOCKED (in-memory). SharePoint storage is MOCKED.
